evals.name: branch-creation-flow
evals.prompt: Execute Phase B step B.1: Create feature branch for task TASK-001 from spec oauth2-social-login. Branch naming convention: feature/{spec-name}
expectations: Should create a branch following feature/{spec-name} convention
Should branch from main or master
Should confirm active branch after creation

evals.name: test-verification
evals.prompt: Phase B B.3: Verify test results for completed TASK-006 (OAuth2 integration tests). Run test suite and validate all tests pass before proceeding to Phase C.
expectations: Should execute the test suite for the completed task
Should report test counts and pass/fail status
Should gate Phase C entry on all tests passing
